hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import os, json, glob
cwd = '/Users/lucaslra/learn/monties'
parts = []
claude_md = os.path.join(cwd, 'CLAUDE.md')
if os.path.exists(claude_md):
    parts.append('## CLAUDE.md\n' + open(claude_md).read().strip())
for f in sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(cwd, '.claude/agents/*.md'))):
    parts.append('## Agent: ' + os.path.basename(f).replace('.md', '') + '\n' + open(f).read().strip())
if parts:
    ctx = '\n\n---\n\n'.join(parts)
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': ctx}}))
"
